title: After the Tenno Sho (Autumn): The Queens of Mud! ★

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer gives her all in the autumn Tenno
Sho. She chases after the leading Daitaku Helios
and thrills the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen will be the final hurrah for the
two besties. Mejiro Palmer is determined to show
everyone what she's found by running away from
the Mejiro family.
